query:
-- Service 1: BlitzNet Basic 25-10 Mbps Internet (recurring monthly cost)
-- Monthly cost ex GST: $62.73 (internet) + $2.73 (static IP) = $65.46
INSERT INTO services (
  externalId, customerExternalId, provider, serviceType, planName,
  monthlyCost, status, locationAddress, costSource,
  discoveryNotes, createdAt, updatedAt
) VALUES (
  'S7393', 'C7567', 'Blitznet', 'Internet', 'BlitzNet Basic 25-10 Mbps',
  62.73, 'active', 'Unit 3, 186 Victoria Rd, Marrickville NSW 2204', 'supplier_invoice',
  'Imported from BlitzNet invoice 2025020000013173 (25/03/2025). Month-to-month plan. Service period 24/03/2025 - 23/04/2025. Customer: Kim Walker.',
  NOW(), NOW()
);

-- Service 2: Static IP add-on (recurring monthly)
INSERT INTO services (
  externalId, customerExternalId, provider, serviceType, planName,
  monthlyCost, status, locationAddress, costSource,
  discoveryNotes, createdAt, updatedAt
) VALUES (
  'S7394', 'C7567', 'Blitznet', 'Other', 'BlitzNet Static IP',
  2.73, 'active', 'Unit 3, 186 Victoria Rd, Marrickville NSW 2204', 'supplier_invoice',
  'Static IP add-on for BlitzNet Basic 25-10 Mbps service. Imported from invoice 2025020000013173. Period 24/03/2025 - 23/04/2025.',
  NOW(), NOW()
);
